title: Enhanced Dashboard Performance
description: Improved loading times and added new filtering capabilities to the dashboard.

body.raw:
We're excited to announce significant improvements to our dashboard performance and new filtering capabilities.

## What's New

### ⚡ Performance Improvements
- **50% faster loading times** for dashboard pages
- Optimized database queries for better response times
- Reduced bundle size through code splitting

### 🔍 Advanced Filtering
- New multi-select filters for data views
- Save and share custom filter presets
- Real-time filter suggestions

### 🐛 Bug Fixes
- Fixed issue with pagination not working correctly
- Resolved chart rendering problems on mobile devices
- Fixed memory leak in real-time data updates

## Technical Details

This update includes:
- Upgraded to React 19 for better performance
- Implemented virtual scrolling for large datasets
- Added service worker for offline capability

## Migration Notes

No breaking changes in this release. All existing integrations will continue to work seamlessly.
